./peer (self) id ip port (previous) id ip port (next) id ip port

  1 localhost 1500      301 localhost 1503      101 localhost 1501
101 localhost 1501        1 localhost 1500      201 localhost 1502
201 localhost 1502      101 localhost 1501      301 localhost 1503
301 localhost 1503      201 localhost 1502        1 localhost 1500


add later to cmake set(CMAKE_RUNTIME_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/build")

10000 127.0.0.1 4001 50000 127.0.0.1 4009 15000 127.0.0.1 4002
15000 127.0.0.1 4002 10000 127.0.0.1 4001 20000 127.0.0.1 4003
20000 127.0.0.1 4003 15000 127.0.0.1 4002 25000 127.0.0.1 4004
25000 127.0.0.1 4004 20000 127.0.0.1 4003 30000 127.0.0.1 4005
30000 127.0.0.1 4005 25000 127.0.0.1 4004 35000 127.0.0.1 4006
35000 127.0.0.1 4006 30000 127.0.0.1 4005 40000 127.0.0.1 4007
40000 127.0.0.1 4007 35000 127.0.0.1 4006 45000 127.0.0.1 4008
45000 127.0.0.1 4008 40000 127.0.0.1 4007 50000 127.0.0.1 4009
50000 127.0.0.1 4009 45000 127.0.0.1 4008 10000 127.0.0.1 4001

10000 localhost 4001 50000 localhost 4009 15000 localhost 4002
15000 localhost 4002 10000 localhost 4001 20000 localhost 4003
20000 localhost 4003 15000 localhost 4002 25000 localhost 4004
25000 localhost 4004 20000 localhost 4003 30000 localhost 4005
30000 localhost 4005 25000 localhost 4004 35000 localhost 4006
35000 localhost 4006 30000 localhost 4005 40000 localhost 4007
40000 localhost 4007 35000 localhost 4006 45000 localhost 4008
45000 localhost 4008 40000 localhost 4007 50000 localhost 4009
50000 localhost 4009 45000 localhost 4008 10000 localhost 4001
